posts.content:

posts.content:
🔥 Figma Skills for Claude Code

Figma recently released a collection of Skills for Claude Code that allow Claude to take actions on the Figma canvas.

🔺 What exactly are Figma skills

Think of Figma skills as a collection of instructions that teach Claude Code how to interact https://t.co/Sf5P9NX2nW

ai.title: 🔥 Figma Skills for Claude Code. Figma recently released a collection of Skills for Claude Code that allow Claude to take actions on the Figma canvas.
ai.summary: Explains Figma Skills as instructions that teach Claude Code how to interact with Figma canvas for automated design actions.
ai.why_important: Enables direct AI manipulation of design files, bridging code and visual design.
ai.learnings: How to use Figma Skills to automate design actions through Claude Code integration.

author.name: 852話(hakoniwa)
author.headline: hakoniwa is the Executive Director of And Idea Co., Ltd. @AndIdea_jp For work requests, please contact info@andidea.jp. お仕事のご依頼はメールへどうぞ。AIをツールとして活用しています。

posts.content:
一枚絵をAI自動パーツ分けと穴埋めするSee-throughをComfyUIで使用
1280x1280、RTX 5090で2分程度
Live2Dのモデルテンプレートを適用5分
描画順とメッシュの軽微な編集7,8分
物理や細かい表情なしで、ベースがLive2Dで動かせるようになるまで15～20分くらい？ 画期的だな https://t.co/399oBGEC3o

ai.title: 一枚絵をAI自動パーツ分けと穴埋めするSee-throughをComfyUIで使用。1280x1280、RTX 5090で2分程度。Live2Dのモデルテンプレートを適用5分。描画順とメッシュの軽微な編集7,8分。物理や細かい表情なしで、ベースがLive2Dで動かせるようになるまで15～20分くらい？ 画期的だな
ai.summary: ComfyUIのSee-throughを使って一枚絵を自動でパーツ分けし、Live2Dアニメーション用に変換する15-20分の完全ワークフロー。
ai.why_important: 静止画から動的アニメーションまでの時間を劇的に短縮する革新的なワークフロー。
ai.learnings: 一枚絵からLive2Dアニメーションまでの具体的な時間配分と手順。

ai.title: ComfyUI-See-through. Single-image layer decomposition for Live2D in ComfyUI! splits characters into layers + Marigold depth maps; exports PSDs; smart splitting for eyes/hair; auto-model downloading.
ai.summary: Single-image layer decomposition tool for Live2D in ComfyUI that automatically splits characters, creates depth maps, and exports PSDs with smart splitting features.
ai.why_important: Automates complex character rigging process for 2D animation workflows.
ai.learnings: Complete pipeline for converting static images to layered Live2D-ready assets.

posts.content:
3DGS of Japanese cherry blossoms(see in 4K video)
"OSMO360(just 10min walk )->Metashape(Tie point clean)->my tools->(LFS)LichtFeld Studio(MRNF)"
I didn't even do any cleanup!!
See my instruction : https://t.co/HYzA35yPNu https://t.co/v3YgNEBhco

ai.title: 3DGS of Japanese cherry blossoms(see in 4K video) "OSMO360(just 10min walk )->Metashape(Tie point clean)->my tools->(LFS)LichtFeld Studio(MRNF)" I didn't even do any cleanup!!
ai.summary: Complete 3D Gaussian Splatting workflow for Japanese cherry blossoms: 10min OSMO360 capture -> Metashape processing -> custom tools -> LichtFeld Studio rendering, no cleanup required.
ai.why_important: Demonstrates streamlined photogrammetry to 3DGS pipeline with minimal manual intervention.
ai.learnings: End-to-end 3DGS creation workflow with specific tool chain and timing.

author.name: Angela Dai
author.headline: Associate Professor @ Technical University of Munich

posts.content:
📢Seen2Scene

Real-world 3D is incomplete, typically requiring training on synthetic scene data.

@QTDSMQ introduces visibility-guided flow matching, enabling training on real partial scans for scan completion & text-to-3D scene generation!

Check it out: https://t.co/jqZ164QX0W https://t.co/GV5Q4ZvBPj

ai.title: 📢Seen2Scene. Real-world 3D is incomplete, typically requiring training on synthetic scene data. introduces visibility-guided flow matching, enabling training on real partial scans for scan completion & text-to-3D scene generation!
ai.summary: Research breakthrough enabling training on real partial 3D scans instead of synthetic data, supporting both scan completion and text-to-3D scene generation using visibility-guided flow matching.
ai.why_important: Addresses fundamental limitation in 3D scene generation by working with real-world incomplete data.
ai.learnings: Advanced technique for 3D scene completion and generation from partial real-world scans.
